name: split-flap-display
description: Retro airport-style split-flap display for TVs with backend control

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Run ./test-suite.sh on Linux/Mac or \".\\test-windows.ps1\" on Windows')"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const db=path.join('server','db','display.db'); if(fs.existsSync(db))fs.unlinkSync(db); console.log('Cleaned up database files')"
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use git commands directly to push'

author: automate-and-deploy
